mapper.select: SELECT GOODS_SQ, PID, FRST_USER_SQ, SECON_USER_SQ, REGISTER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(REGIST_DT, '%Y%m%d') AS REGIST_DT, DATE_FORMAT(RECKN_BGN_DE, '%Y%m%d') AS RECKN_BGN_DE, COST_DEPT, RQEST_CODE, INSTL_DEPT FROM TN_GOODS ORDER BY GOODS_SQ ASC
SELECT GU_SQ, USER_NM, POSITION, LEFT(MOBLPHON, 40) AS MOBLPHON, LEFT(TELNO, 12) AS TELNO, JOB_CDS, JOB_COUNTERPART_CDS, INVT_GOODS_CDS, WORK_DEPT FROM TN_GOODS_USER ORDER BY GU_SQ ASC
